title: picea abies f. finedonensis
intro:
Picea abies f. friedonensis, also known as Silver Fir or Abies alba f. friedonensis, is a variant of the Abies alba species, a type of evergreen coniferous tree native to the mountains of Central and Southern Europe.

This variant of the tree is prized for its medicinal properties, which are primarily attributed to its essential oils and resin. The essential oils from Picea abies f. friedonensis have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to their anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties.
